name: Strawberry Amaretto Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
In a small mixing bowl, combine the crumbs, sugar, and butter. Blend well with fingers, fork, or pastry blender. Press onto the bottom of a well-buttered springform pan. Chill for 30 minutes.
FILLING
2 pounds CREAM CHEESE, softened
1 1/2 cups GRANULATED SUGAR
1 cup HEAVY CREAM
6 EGGS
2 tablespoons LEMON JUICE
1/2 teaspoon BRANDY or BRANDY EXTRACT
1 cup SOUR CREAM
1 tablespoon VANILLA EXTRACT
2 tablespoons ALL-PURPOSE FLOUR, sifted
1 cup FRESH STRAWBERRIES, chopped
In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese, sugar, and heavy cream until smooth. Add the eggs one at a time, making sure that the mixture is smooth and creamy. Fold in the strawberries. Pour the mixture into the chilled pan and bake in a pre-heated 425°F oven for 15 minutes. Reduce the temperature to 275°F and continue to bake for 1 hour. Transfer to a wire rack and allow to cool for 3 hours.
TOPPING
2 1/2 cups FRESH STRAWBERRIES, chopped
1 cup AMARETTO LIQUEUR
1 tablespoon GRANULATED SUGAR
